source: BTD Mod Helper game data export (Rounds/AlternateRoundSet)
cash_source: ABR per-round cash = pop_count x cash-per-pop decay + ($100 + n) end-of-round bonus — the same derivation as rounds.json, with the decay bands read from the dump's IncomeSets/DefaultIncomeSet.json (ABR applies no income mutator; Mods/AlternateBloonsRounds.json is a roundset swap only). cumulative_cash baselines at round 3 with the $650 Hard start (Mods/Hard.json: StartingCash 650, StartingRound 3, EndRound 80); ABR rounds 1-2 are never played, so their cumulative_cash is null.
